events.name: GAME_END
events.description: Emitted when result becomes won or lost

events.name: TILE_CLICK
events.description: Moves the shopkeeper toward the clicked tile

events.name: UNIT_CLICK
events.description: Serves the clicked customer when the shopkeeper is adjacent

events.name: PLAY_AGAIN
events.description: Emits UI:{playAgainEvent} with {} on play again / reset

overridableConfigKeys.label: Features
overridableConfigKeys.description: Shop fixtures (shelves/freezers/checkout/carts) and food props on the floor.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Tiles
overridableConfigKeys.description: 5×6 shop floor grid (wall border + door) — takes priority over entity-derived tiles.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Units
overridableConfigKeys.description: Initial roster: shopkeeper + 2 customers — takes priority over entity-derived units.
